---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/usimu13
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aphiautimuan/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/aphiaut
---

Hello guys!!! My name is Aphiaut Imuan, you can call me Auggie.

I hope everyone will fun with my blog
